channel.title: Azure WAF on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure WAF on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft HTTP DDoS Ruleset for Azure WAF on Azure Front Door Premium
item.description:
Microsoft has announced public preview of the HTTP DDoS Ruleset for Azure WAF on Azure Front Door Premium. The feature is intended to help protect against HTTP-layer DDoS attacks, which can bypass traditional static controls.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Default Rule Set 2.2 and updates to ruleset support policy
item.description:
Azure WAF has made Default Rule Set (DRS) 2.2 generally available on Azure Application Gateway and Azure Front Door. The managed ruleset support policy is being updated to reflect this release and provide more predictable support guidance.

  • Source: Azure Updates
